title: senecio sheldonensis
intro: Senecio sheldonensis, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Senecio sheldonensis is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to support respiratory and immune system health.
